item.title: 1.0 - What is Software Engineering
item.description: First, we need to understand what does Software means.

item.title: 1.1 - Legacy Software
item.description: Legacy A set of software that can be in active mode and outdated in the same time, A good examples can be: ATM machines that still runs DOS or any old operating system.

item.title: Interestings
item.description: All the things that I want to as side jobs How to make package in flatpak Read the source code of maxwell spinning cat github convert my notes images to webp for better performance Read more about Siberia country (bikal lake) What is UML in software engineering Check out Daniel63.com web space Check...

item.title: Unix shared system
item.description: Hello, I was searching about the indie web that I got something very cool! there is a concept called Tilde that users use a share Unix base operating system for creating stuff such as web pages.

item.title: Queue
item.description: Atomic Habits Clean Code - Robert C. Martin Essential Scrum - Kenneth S. Rubin .

item.title: What is Machine Automata theory
item.description: Automata theory is the study of abstract machines and Automata, and how or what tasks can we solve with them.

item.title: Back-end Tasks
item.description: Learn DSA completely Object relational mapping libraries (ORM) Checkout Sharding database design principle Checkout React Query Checkout ClickUp Program Learn backend engineering - with this Playlist what is preflight request Deploy apps tutorial - www.youtube.com/watch watch this video microservic...

item.title: Progress List
item.description: my last progress states: runtime.Caller go function documentation Watching youtube Watching the history of visual novel games Working with Dillo browser Working on my website .

item.title: Dillo Browser
item.description: Well I’m compiling the dillo browser, it seems like a great software! I’m so excited for it :3.
